main.name: Corestack Solutions
main.description: We develop applications and technological solutions that integrate innovation, efficiency, and quality. We specialize in robust and customized technology stacks
main.bio: At Corestack Solutions we build software that solves real problems. We develop mobile applications and web platforms for businesses that need reliable, scalable technology — delivered on time.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with us to learn more about how we can help you achieve your technological goals.

education.degree: React Native · TypeScript · Zustand · TanStack Query
education.description: End-to-end mobile app development with real-time capabilities, QR scanning via Vision Camera, push notifications with Firebase + Notifee, and multi-role navigation with React Navigation.
Modern frontend architecture with responsive design, smooth animations via Framer Motion, bilingual EN/ES content management, and EmailJS contact form integration.
API integration with Axios interceptors, cloud deployment on Railway, real-time communication via Socket.IO, and push notifications with Firebase Messaging.

Design and development of REST APIs with Node.js and Express: business logic, email delivery, payment processing, MySQL database management, and hardware integration for automated vehicle barrier control.

work.title: Mobile App Developer — React Native
work.description: Built Residence – QR Residential Access Control from the ground up. Multi-role app (resident/guard) with QR scanning via Vision Camera, real-time barrier automation via Socket.IO, push notifications with Firebase + Notifee, and persistent state with Zustand + TanStack Query. Deployed on App Store and Google Play.

work.title: Frontend Developer — Web
work.description: Developed the corporate portfolio site using React 19, Vite, TypeScript strict, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Implemented bilingual EN/ES architecture, React Router v6, and client-side email sending via EmailJS.

projects.title: MERN Stack WhatsApp Clone
projects.category: WhatsApp Clone built with MERN (MongoDB, ExpressJS, ReactJS, NodeJS)

projects.title: MERN Stack TikTok Clone
projects.category: TikTok Clone built with MERN (MongoDB, ExpressJS, ReactJS, NodeJS)

testimonials.text: QR Residential Access Control completely transformed how we manage access in our community. The automated barrier system and real-time monitoring gave us full control and peace of mind. Corestack's support throughout the implementation was outstanding.

As a real estate developer, security and access control are top priorities. QR Residential Access Control gave our projects a real competitive advantage — residents love the convenience and we have complete visibility of every entry.
